subject: How do I create an automation rule?
body: I saw the announcement about the new Automations feature. Where do I set up a rule like 'when a task moves to Done, notify the channel'? Couldn't find it under project settings.

subject: An automation moved every task on our board to Done
body: I set up a rule 'when due date passes, mark as Done' and this morning ALL 300 tasks on the board got closed, including ones without due dates. This wrecked our sprint board. Please help us roll this back ASAP.

subject: Automation fires twice — duplicate Slack notifications
body: Every time a task changes status our 'notify Slack' automation posts the same message twice. The channel is getting spammy and people started muting it.

subject: Can automations run on a schedule?
body: The new Automations look great for event triggers, but can I run one every Friday at 5pm (e.g. archive completed tasks)? If not, consider this a request — it would replace our cron hack.

subject: Automations tab missing on mobile
body: On the iOS app I don't see the Automations tab that the release notes mention. Web has it. Is mobile support coming or am I missing a setting?

subject: What counts as an automation run for the quota?
body: The pricing page says Pro includes 1000 automation runs/month. Does a rule that matches zero tasks still count as a run? Trying to estimate if we'll fit in the quota.

subject: Charged for the Automations add-on we never enabled
body: Our June invoice has a $19 line item 'Automations add-on' but nobody on the team enabled it. Please remove it and refund the charge.

subject: Automation rule deleted our priority labels
body: A rule I created to 'clean up stale labels' removed the priority labels from 40+ active tasks. The rule preview showed only 3 tasks would be affected. We need those labels restored.

subject: Locked out again after the release
body: Since the Automations release I get 'invalid credentials' on every login attempt even after a password reset. Second time this quarter — getting really tired of this.

subject: Automations replaced my Monday cloning ritual — thank you!
body: I asked about recurring tasks a while back. With Automations I built a 'clone task every Monday' rule and it just works. Great release! One question: can a rule copy checklists too?
